articles.title: Trump administration ramps up denaturalization campaign, targeting U.S. citizens accused of crimes, fraud, terrorism - CBS News
articles.description: The Trump administration announced a major expansion of its denaturalization campaign targeting foreign-born American citizens accused of fraudulently obtaining U.S. citizenship.

articles.description: It's the biggest day for America's restaurants, and one of the biggest for flower sales. Despite anxieties over rising gas prices, people are ready to splurge to celebrate.
